phrases.intent_en: Can I pay at the café terrace before sitting
phrases.text_local: Můžu zaplatit na zahrádce, než si sednu?
phrases.cultural_note: Table service is typical; paying at the counter beforehand is unusual.

likely_response.local: Ne, plaťte až u stolu, prosím.
likely_response.translation_en: No, please pay at the table.

responses.english: No, please pay at the table.
responses.local: Ne, plaťte až u stolu, prosím.

phrases.intent_en: Do market stalls here take cash only
phrases.cultural_note: Small market stalls in Czechia often prefer cash, but some have terminals.

likely_response.local: Většinou ano, ale někdy i kartu.
likely_response.translation_en: Mostly yes, but sometimes card too.

responses.english: Mostly yes, but sometimes card too.
responses.local: Většinou ano, ale někdy i kartu.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the nearest tram ticket machine
phrases.text_local: Kde je nejbližší automat na lístky?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket machines are often near tram stops rather than in the center of squares.

likely_response.translation_en: At the edge of the square, by the stop.

responses.english: At the edge of the square, by the stop.
